# konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding (Resource)

MeshAccessRoleBinding Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding" "my_meshaccessrolebinding" {
  cp_id = "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b"
  labels = {
    key = "value"
  }
  name = "...my_name..."
  roles = [
    "..."
  ]
  subjects = [
    {
      name = "...my_name..."
      type = "...my_type..."
    }
  ]
  type = "...my_type..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cp_id` (String) Id of the Konnect resource. Requires replacement if changed.
- `name` (String) name of the AccessRoleBinding
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `labels` (Map of String)
- `roles` (List of String)
- `subjects` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subjects))

### Read-Only

- `warnings` (List of String) warnings is a list of warning messages to return to the requesting Kuma API clients.
Warning messages describe a problem the client making the API request should correct or be aware of.

<a id="nestedatt--subjects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subjects`

Optional:

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding.my_konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding
  id = jsonencode({
    cp_id = "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b"
    name = "..."
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding.my_konnect-beta_mesh_access_role_binding '{"cp_id": "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b", "name": "..."}'
```
